extDescription.message: Connect selected host platform accounts to Hostier for reservation sync

platformListIntro.message:
Click Connect to open the website and sign in there.
Once sign-in is complete, the platform account connects to Hostier automatically.

loginGateTitle.message: Sign in to Hostier before connecting platforms

loginGateBody.message: The extension only syncs platform cookies and tokens after it can verify the Hostier account that will receive them.

consentTitle.message: Consent is required before the first platform connection

consentBody.message: Hostier reads the selected platform's login cookies and required authentication data, then sends them to the Hostier server to support reservation sync.

connectDisclosureBody.message: $platform$ connection only starts when you explicitly request it.

connectDisclosureCheckbox.message: I have read this and want to continue with the connection.

disclosureReadsAuth.message: Hostier reads the $platform$ login cookie and the authentication data needed for the connection.

disclosureTransfersToHostier.message: The captured authentication data is sent to the Hostier server to provide reservation sync.

disclosureEncryptedStorage.message: The transfer uses HTTPS and the data is encrypted at rest on the server.

disclosure33m2AutoMaintain.message: For 33m2, Hostier tries to keep the connection active on the server after you connect.

disclosureManualReconnect.message: For this platform in the public build, automatic maintenance is disabled and you may need to reconnect manually.

disclosure33m2OpenTab.message: 33m2 requires an open logged-in tab so the extension can read the required auth material.

disclosureDisconnectDeletes.message: Disconnecting removes the stored connection state and authentication material.

autoMaintainInterrupted.message: Automatic maintenance stopped and needs reconnect

permissionDenied.message: Hostier cannot continue because $platform$ access was not granted.

statusLoadFailed.message: Failed to load the connection status. Try again.

loginAndReturn.message: Sign in to $platform$, then return to the extension and connect again.

loginAndReturn33m2.message: Sign in to 33m2, keep a logged-in tab open, then return to the extension and connect again.

missing33m2OpenTab.message: A logged-in 33m2 tab must be open before this connection can continue.

missing33m2RefreshToken.message: Hostier could not read the 33m2 refresh token. Keep a logged-in 33m2 tab open and try again.

connectionFailed.message: Failed to connect $platform$. Check the login state and permissions, then try again.
